criteria.name: epic_creation
criteria.description: At least one Epic markdown file is created in docs/epics/ with correct YAML frontmatter

criteria.name: feature_extraction
criteria.description: Feature files are created in docs/features/ with exhaustive Given-When-Then acceptance criteria and no platform-specific references

criteria.name: user_story_extraction
criteria.description: User Story files are created in docs/user-stories/ with BDD scenarios and a Required Features Matrix linking to GitHub Issue IDs

criteria.name: use_case_extraction
criteria.description: Use Case files are created in docs/use-cases/ with Actors, Preconditions, Main Success Scenario, and Realization Matrix

criteria.name: github_instrumentation
criteria.description: GitHub issues are created with correct labels (epic, feature, user-story, use-case) and cross-referenced via Issue IDs

criteria.name: source_references
criteria.description: Every generated markdown file includes a Source References section with links to the structural schema and normative text

criteria.name: platform_independence
criteria.description: Feature specs contain no platform-specific references (no framework names, no UI component names). They are purely functional

criteria.name: duplicate_detection
criteria.description: Re-running the pipeline does not create duplicate GitHub issues
